faqs.question: What cricket species are most common in Island Park?
faqs.answer: Island Park typically sees house crickets and field crickets, with the coastal environment also attracting camel crickets to basements and crawl spaces. Field crickets are especially common near the waterfront properties along Reynolds Channel, while house crickets tend to invade homes seeking warmth as temperatures drop in fall.
